_note: Kernel freeze record (architecture §5.2 / D-5). This is the proto-manifest: it records the kernel module hashes and the commit SHA at the point the kernel was tagged kernel-v1. The full freeze manifest (manifest.json) is generated by harness/manifest.py before any frozen campaign run.
ownership_note: kernel/ is neutral — authored by the harness engineer, not the Epic 2 tree author or the Epic 3 agent-prompt author (FR-10 / architecture R-8). Neither system may modify kernel/ after this tag.

contract_notes.FlagForCall1.field_id: Optional[str]=None — additive refinement of §10.2 stub; DRI-ratified 2026-06-02. Needed for the §3.2 end_section reachability guard.
contract_notes.StateReducer: StateReducer(frame) rather than bare apply(state, tool_call) — ratified; necessary to enforce §3.2 guard without leaking the scored set.
contract_notes.ToolCallEvent.call_type: Added to §10.2 stub for FR-6 audit (call_type + temperature logged per call).
